summary: TWO_COLUMN: number line ±100 around center. ValueTracker center_tr slides center through 1,000,000 → 1,005,000 → 999,000 → 1,003,000 → 1,000,000. always_redraw dots at each integer: YELLOW if prime (radius 0.06), BLUE_D otherwise (radius 0.03). Live window center, prime count, expected 200/ln(x), and π(10^6) = 78,498.
